name: Smartlook
description: Smartlook is a qualitative analytics platform for web and mobile apps. Record user sessions, analyze heatmaps, track events, and build funnels to understand user behavior.

capabilities.name: list_recordings
capabilities.description: List and filter session recordings by date, duration, and user attributes.

capabilities.name: get_recording
capabilities.description: Get details of a specific session recording.

capabilities.name: list_events
capabilities.description: List tracked events with filtering and aggregation.

capabilities.name: list_funnels
capabilities.description: List configured funnels and their conversion rates.

capabilities.name: get_heatmap
capabilities.description: Retrieve heatmap data for a specific page.

capabilities.name: identify_user
capabilities.description: Set identity and custom properties for a visitor.
